summary: Systems OK with 1 item(s) needing attention.

alerts.title: OpenClaw update available: 2026.4.9 → 2026.4.11 (released 2026-04-12)
alerts.body: Risk: MEDIUM — review gateway/agent changes before updating. Relevant to our setup: Memory/wiki enhancements (Could improve AlexI's long-term memory); Telegram changes (Our primary channel — worth reviewing); Gateway changes (Core infra — review carefully before updating); Agent runtime changes (Affects how all our agents run); New embed/output tags (Potentially useful for our HTML dashboard); WhatsApp changes (Planned for Milestone 4 — good to know); ChatGPT import (Could help migrate existing conversations to AlexI). Not relevant for us: Feishu (not used), Video generation (not used).

upcoming.title: Milestone 5: Chief of Staff — GTD Layer
